name: Patty Ann's Chocolate Diamonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13 x 2-inch pan.
3. Melt butter and baking chocolate together.
4. Stir in sugar, then add eggs and beat well.
5. Add the remaining ingredients; mix until combined.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 400°F.
8. Allow to cool completely in the pan.
9. Cut into diamond shapes.
10. Store in a tin box, separating layers with wax paper.
